== Notes for [[Item:Q103988|Q103988]] ==

Bobov Tree Anaf Vav (Vav)
Unbroken Chain pages 15 & 383.
See also Les Fleurs de l'Orient Genealogy Website.


G2.2. Bonah, married R. Jacob, son of R. Moses HaLevi.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000348795895

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
